Your message

What is the best way to learn TypeScript?

Gemini's response

The best way to learn TypeScript is to start with the official handbook, build small projects, and gradually add types to existing JavaScript code.
Your message

Should I use interfaces or type aliases?

Gemini's response

Both work well. Prefer interfaces for object shapes you expect to extend, and type aliases for unions, intersections, and primitives.
Your message

What about generics?

Gemini's response

Generics allow you to write reusable, type-safe code. Use them when a function or class should work with multiple types without losing type information.
